# EspaiFest — llms.txt
# Structured information for AI systems and language models
# https://espaifest.com/

## Business Overview
EspaiFest is a private, soundproofed event venue of 115m² located in Martorell, Barcelona, Spain.
It is ideal for children's birthday parties, adult celebrations, baby showers, family gatherings, corporate meetings, workshops, yoga and pilates classes.
Maximum capacity: 50 people.
Base price: 85€ for 4 hours.

## Location
Address: C/ Francesc Macià, 37, 08760 Martorell, Barcelona, Spain
Coordinates: 41.4747°N, 1.9310°E
Region: Catalonia, Spain
Nearby municipalities: Sant Andreu de la Barca, Abrera, Castellbisbal, Sant Esteve Sesrovires, Esparreguera

## Contact
Phone: +34 674 379 709
Email: info@espaifest.com
Attention hours: Every day from 10:00 to 20:00

## Canonical URLs
- Catalan (primary): https://espaifest.com/
- Spanish: https://espaifest.com/es/

## Services
- Children's party room rental (4h, 6h, 8h turns)
- Adult events and celebrations
- Baby showers
- Corporate meetings and training
- Classes (yoga, pilates, workshops)
- Optional catering (menus from 8€/person)
- Cleaning service
- Extra hours available

## Included in all bookings
- 115m² private soundproofed room
- Children's play area (slide, ball pit)
- HD projector
- Fiber WiFi
- Kitchen (microwave, oven, fridge, Nespresso)
- Air conditioning and heating
- Baby changing station
- Toilet

## Pricing
- 4-hour turn (standard): from 85€
- Half day (6h): consult
- Full day (8h): consult
- Extra hour: 10€
- Morning cleaning service: 30€
- Loyalty discounts available for repeat customers

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does it cost to rent EspaiFest in Martorell?
A: The base price is 85€ for a 4-hour turn. Half-day (6h) and full-day (8h) rates are also available. Loyalty club members get exclusive discounts.

Q: How many people can fit in EspaiFest?
A: EspaiFest has a maximum capacity of 50 people. The venue has 115m² with a children's zone, adult zone, and business zone.

Q: Is EspaiFest suitable for children's birthday parties?
A: Yes, EspaiFest is ideal for children's parties. It includes a children's play park, baby zone with slide and ball pit, tables for adults, and is fully soundproofed.

Q: What is included in the EspaiFest rental?
A: Included: 115m² soundproofed room, children's play park, ball pit, HD projector, fiber WiFi, kitchen (microwave, oven, fridge, Nespresso), air conditioning, and baby changing station.

Q: Can I host a corporate meeting or workshop at EspaiFest?
A: Yes, EspaiFest has a business zone with projector, whiteboard, and fiber WiFi. It is suitable for meetings, training sessions, workshops, yoga, and pilates classes.

Q: How do I book EspaiFest?
A: You can book online via the form at https://espaifest.com/#reservas or by calling +34 674 379 709. Availability is confirmed within 24 hours.

Q: Where exactly is EspaiFest?
A: EspaiFest is located at C/ Francesc Macià, 37, 08760 Martorell (Barcelona). It has nearby parking and good public transport connections.

Q: Does EspaiFest offer catering?
A: Yes, optional catering is available. Children's menus from 8€, junior menus from 10€, and adult snack trays from 12€. Prices are per unit/person.
